name: Machete
description: A ferocious Melee Weapon crafted by the Grineer and carried by their elite melee forces.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: A ferocious Melee Weapon crafted by the Grineer and carried by their elite melee forces.

drops.location: Cephalon Simaris, Unlock through Daily Tribute

components.name: Gallium
components.description:
Soft metal used in microelectronics and energy weapons.

Location: Mars and Uranus

components.name: Plastids
components.description:
A disgusting nanite-infested tissue mass.

Location: Phobos, Saturn, Uranus, Pluto, and Eris

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.changes: Fixed being unable to damage the Narmer Scyto Raknoid while Kahl has the Machete equipped.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Kahl’s Machete in The New War Quest not functioning.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.4
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Kahl being unable to be damaged by the Narmer Scyto Raknoid’s melee attacks while his Machete is in hand.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
Slaytra Machete
Items marked with a * are exclusive to this pack for a limited time. In an effort to continue to make Supporter packs more player-friendly, everything else listed can either be purchased separately from the in-game Market for Platinum or can be earned (Slaytra Machete, Afentis Speargun, Aegrit Thrown Weapon). The free path to the listed weapons will be available next week with the release of Kahl’s Garrison.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: TennoGen: Update 30.2.0
patchlogs.changes: Udjyat’s Serpent Machete Skin by Vulbjorn, the graphical walrus.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: TennoGen: Update 30.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Kuther Machete Skin by lukinu_u & HEILAH
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Machete not being visible when ‘View when Holstered’ is enabled.

patchlogs.name: Orphix Venom: Hotfix 29.6.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Machete Wraith from only hitting once per enemy when using its Heavy Attack.

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Hotfix 29.5.2
patchlogs.changes: Made the Machete item in Simaris’ store accessible to those who had obtained it and sold it by means not considered in this store.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with several one-handed Melee weapons not functioning (as an accidental result of the Glaive changes). Weapons included: most Machetes, Plasma Sword, Destreza and Destreza Prime, Sheev, and Scoliac.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.additions: Added the Machete Blueprint to Simaris’ Offerings.

patchlogs.name: Rising Tide: Hotfix 26.1.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed misaligned Link when viewing the Kludgekil Machete Zaw Skin.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.3
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Prova series, Kreska, Sheev, Machete series, Mire, Scoliac, Kama, Nami Solo, Plasma Sword and Destreza series not consuming Combo Counter on Heavy Attack.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.18.0
patchlogs.changes: A heavy Zaw Strike for Machete and Hammer weapons. Measure twice, strike once... heavily.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U4+4.1
patchlogs.changes: The new Nightwatch Skin Pack will include skins for: Grinlok, Tonkor, Marelok, Brakk, Diriga, Dual Cleavers, Machete and Jat Kittag. Find them in the Market today!

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes: Added stealth finishers for Machete, Polearm, Rapier, Staff, Sword, Sword & Shield, Tonfa, and Whip weapons when used against MOAs.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.6
patchlogs.changes: Scythe, Machete, Fist and Tonfa melee weapons and Stances have had their damage increased in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.changes: All Machete melee weapons are now available in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes: Strun, Machete, Cleaver has been given the PBR treatment.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.3: The New Protocols
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Grineer Scorpion Machete attack not hitting stationary players all of the time.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.9.2
patchlogs.fixes: The Tenno Reinforcements Vault has been opened: Reintroducing the Machete! This relic of the Grineer past has been revived for a limited time. Log in between today and July 16th at Noon EDT to receive the Machete blueprint in your inbox!

patchlogs.name: Update 13.5.0: Edo Armor & Nami Solo
patchlogs.fixes:
Nami Solo! Wield the curved Blade of the Nami Solo and lash out with incredible slashing lethality! The Nami Solo uses the Machete Stances for combos and can be found in the Market for Platinum or Blueprint today!
New Combo for the Machete Weapons Sundering Weave Stance: Flash Flood!

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.0.3: Hotter Than Ruk’S Guns!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Machete Wraith not being right size.

patchlogs.name: Update 11: Valkyr Unleashed
patchlogs.changes:
Switched the Prova to use Machete animations and finishers
Tuned conclave values for Brakk, Machete Wraith, and Obex

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.4: Double Affinity Weekend!
patchlogs.fixes: Fix for Machete first Strike missing a lot
